output_LTL: explainPath & mission & pathPlanning & avoidObstacles & timeCritical & followPath & (unexpectedObstacle -> routeChange) & !safetyConcernDetected & lowRisk & calculateTaskCompletionProbability & probComplete_greaterThanOrEqual_p & timeConstraints & !planDeviation & noDeviations

explanation: The robot needs to explain the path it is planning to take (explainPath) and provide reasoning (provideReason) for why this path is the optimal choice. This is a global property (G).

explanation_dict.natural_language: The robot explains the path
The robot provides reasoning for the path
Globally

explanation: The robot is in path planning. The explanation will start with the intended path, it will explain all the steps and why it is the optimal path based on the current situation of the robot.

explanation_dict.natural_language: The robot is in path planning
The robot intends to take a certain path
Explains all the steps in the current situation
Explain why it is the optimal path

explanation: The robot is planning its path. First, if the mission is on and it is not in an area to be avoided and there are no unexpected obstacles, and the robot has a self-recovery strategy with high confidence, then the robot explains its current path and intends to follow that path. If any of these conditions is violated, the robot must change plan and provide a reason for the plan deviation. The optimality of the choice is that it's the safest choice considering the self-recovery strategy.

explanation_dict.natural_language: Mission is on and area is not to be avoided and there are no unexpected obstacles and self-recovery strategy is confident
The robot explains its current path and intends to follow that path
If the mission is on and not to be avoided and no unexpected obstacles and self-recovery strategy is confident, then the robot explains the current path and follows it.
If any of the above conditions are violated, the robot must change the plan and provide a reason for the plan deviation.
